texto: Through God's grace, he gives us a wealth of resources to bear any burden he allows. Therefore, if God doesn't empty our cup of suffering or take it from us, he will give ample grace (favor, kindness, ability) to bear it.
explicacao: Citação de Jennifer Rothschild sobre temas ligados a fe. “Through God's grace, he gives us a wealth of resources to bear any burden he allows. Therefore, i…” articula fe, grace, suffering em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como suffering.
